case_title: THOMAS HIGGINS ET AL VS. BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIGGINS, THOMAS HIGGINS, MARIA CUBA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS $600.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $705.00, PLAINTIFF PROVIDED BY A PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE THAT THEY RETURNED THE BICYCLES. THE COURT AWARDS 600 PLUS COSTS, BUT LIMITS SERVICE FEES TO $75.00 PER SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 95.00 - SERVED SEP-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY HIGGINS, THOMAS HIGGINS, MARIA CUBA AS TO DEFENDANT BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 140.00 -
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF THOMNAS HIGGINS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MARIA CUBA HIGGINS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BAY CITY BIKE RENTAL AND TOURS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANDREW M. FOY, GENERAL MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
